label: Scroll-Driven Parallax Layer
summary: Scroll-driven parallax layers using framer-motion's useScroll + useTransform. Provides a small client-side wrapper that maps scroll progress on a target ref to translateY/opacity/scale on a child layer, with prefers-reduced-motion respect and viewport-unit-based defaults so the effect scales across breakpoints. Use for hero backgrounds, layered SVG/image columns, or section-pinned reveal effects on either websites or app-shells.
notes: Sibling of pointer-parallax. Both target the parallax-* capability namespace. Keep the wrapper deliberately minimal so the LLM can paraphrase the inner layer freely; the safety contract (reduced-motion + viewport-unit defaults) lives in the wrapper.
